gates.name: leakage_check
gates.threshold: no game_pk overlap between train (2015-2022) and test (2023-2024)
gates.measured: disjoint season ranges enforced by --train-start 2015 --train-end 2022 --test-start 2023 --test-end 2024; baseline script performs in-memory split on extracted PA-level data

gates.name: ci_coverage
gates.source: results/ci_coverage*.json (not present; informational gate skipped per skill spec)

notes: Pitcher cohort restored: bug in src/analytics/causal_war.py (model produced batter-only effects keyed by batter_id) and scripts/baseline_comparison.py (merge dropped pitchers because they had no causal_war row) was fixed by aggregating the same DML residual Y_res - sign-flipped - by pitcher_id, yielding 851 pitcher effects (746 qualified after IP gate). Combined Pearson r=0.7084 [0.66, 0.75], Spearman rho=0.62 [0.57, 0.66] — point estimate above 0.60 spec but lower CI bound (0.5743) is below 0.60, so STILL FRAGILE per mint criteria. Pitcher-only metrics are the strongest cohort (r=0.7345 [0.69, 0.78], rho=0.6854 [0.63, 0.73]). Test nuisance R2=0.0007 vs train R2=0.0009. Informational CI-coverage gate skipped (no results/ci_coverage*.json present).
